import re
from typing import List


def normalize_users(raw_users: List[dict]) -> List[dict]:
    results = []
    for user in raw_users:
        name = user["name"].strip().title()
        email = user["email"].strip().lower()
        email = re.sub(r"\s+", "", email)
        if not re.match(r"^[^@]+@[^@]+\.[^@]+$", email):
            continue
        results.append({"name": name, "email": email})
    return results


def normalize_contacts(raw_contacts: List[dict]) -> List[dict]:
    results = []
    for contact in raw_contacts:
        name = contact["name"].strip().title()
        email = contact["email"].strip().lower()
        email = re.sub(r"\s+", "", email)
        if not re.match(r"^[^@]+@[^@]+\.[^@]+$", email):
            continue
        results.append({"name": name, "email": email})
    return results


def normalize_leads(raw_leads: List[dict]) -> List[dict]:
    results = []
    for lead in raw_leads:
        name = lead["name"].strip().title()
        email = lead["email"].strip().lower()
        email = re.sub(r"\s+", "", email)
        if not re.match(r"^[^@]+@[^@]+\.[^@]+$", email):
            continue
        results.append({"name": name, "email": email})
    return results
